title: Adoption of the Paris Agreement
why_zh: 《巴黎协定》的通过决定，是后续 NDC、透明度和全球盘点制度的法律起点。

title: Preparations for the entry into force of the Paris Agreement and the first session of the Conference of the Parties serving as the meeting of the Parties to the Paris Agreement
why_zh: 衔接《巴黎协定》生效与实施规则谈判。

title: Fiji momentum for implementation
why_zh: 推动 2018 年促进性对话和巴黎规则工作计划。

title: Preparations for the implementation of the Paris Agreement and the first session of the Conference of the Parties serving as the meeting of the Parties to the Paris Agreement
why_zh: 卡托维兹气候一揽子规则的总括性决定。

title: Chile Madrid Time for Action
why_zh: 马德里会议总括性政治决定。

title: Glasgow Climate Pact
why_zh: 格拉斯哥气候协议，涉及减缓雄心、资金、适应与损失损害。

title: Sharm el-Sheikh Implementation Plan
why_zh: 沙姆沙伊赫实施计划，强调从承诺转向实施。

title: Outcome of the first global stocktake
why_zh: 首次全球盘点成果，是新一轮 NDC 编制与能源转型表述的核心依据。

title: New collective quantified goal on climate finance
why_zh: 巴库新集体量化气候资金目标，是资金谈判的关键基准。

title: Global Mutirão: Uniting humanity in a global mobilization against climate change
why_zh: 贝伦会议总括性决定，连接全球盘点实施、NDC 与气候资金后续工作。

title: Matters related to the global stocktake
why_zh: 跟踪首次全球盘点成果如何进入后续实施与第二次盘点。
